block.header: pisakatano amenokaguyama ko no yupupye kasumi tanabiku paru tatu rasi mo
makimuku no pipara ni tateru parukasumi oboni si omopaba nadumikome ya mo

sentence.transcription: pi para ni tat e ru

block.header: inisipye no pito no uwekyemu sugwi ga ye ni kasumi tanabiku paru pa kinu rasi
kwora ga te wo makimukuyama ni paru sareba konopa sinwogite kasumi tanabiku
tamakagiru yupu sarikureba satupitono yutukwigatake ni kasumi tanabiku
kyesa yukite asu ni pa kinamu to ipisikwoga asadumayama ni kasumi tanabiku

sentence.transcription: asu ni pa ki na mu to

block.header: kwora ga na ni kake no yorosiki asaduma no katayamakwisi ni kasumi tanabiku
utinabiku paru tatinu rasi wa ga kadwo no yanagwi no ure ni ugupisu nakitu
ume no pana sakyeru wokapye ni ipyeworeba tomosiku mo arazu ugupisu no kowe
parukasumi nagaruru napeni awoyagwi no yeda kupimotite ugupisu naku mo
wa ga sekwo wo nakwosi no yama no ywobukwodori kimi ywobikapyese ywo no pukenu twoni
asawide ni kinaku kapotori nare dani mo kimi ni kwopure ya toki wopezu naku
puyugomori paru sarikureba asipikwino yama ni mo nwo ni mo ugupisu naku mo

sentence.transcription: yama ni mo nwo ni mo

block.header: murasaki no nebapu yokonwo no parunwo ni pa kimi wo kaketutu ugupisu naku mo
paru sareba tuma wo motomu to ugupisu no konure wo tutapi nakitutu motona
kasuga n aru pagapinoyama yu sapo no uti pye nakiyuku naru pa tare ywobukwodori
kotapenu ni na ywobitoyome so ywobukwodori sapo no yamapye wo noborikudari ni
adusayumi paruyama tikaku ipyeworeba tugite kiku ramu ugupisu no kowe
utinabiku paru sarikureba sinwo no ure ni wopa utipurete ugupisu naku mo
asagwiri ni sinwonwoni nurete ywobukwodori mipunenoyama yu nakiwataru miyu
utinabiku paru sarikureba sikasugani amakumo kwirapu yuki pa puritutu
ume no pana puriopopu yuki wo tutumimoti kimi ni misemu to toreba kenitutu
ume no pana sakitirisugwinu sikasugani sirayuki nipa ni purisikiritutu
imasarani yuki purame ya mo kagirwopwi no moyuru parubye to narinisi monowo
kaze maziri yuki pa puritutu sikasugani kasumi tanabiki paru sarinikyeri
yama no ma ni ugupisu nakite utinabiku paru to omopedo yuki purisikinu
wo no upe ni puriokyeru yuki si kaze no muta koko ni tiru rasi paru ni pa aredomo
kimi ga tame yamata no sapa ni wegu tumu to yukige no midu ni mo no suswo nurenu
ume ga ye ni nakite uturopu ugupisu no pane sirwotape ni awayuki so puru
yama takami purikuru yuki wo ume no pana tiri ka mo kuru to omopituru kamo
yama takami purikuru yuki wo ume no pana saki ka mo tiru to omopituru kamo
yuki wo okite ume wo na kwopwi so asipikwino yama katadukite ipye wiseru kimi

sentence.transcription: ipye wi s e ru kimi

block.header: kinopu koso tosi pa patesika parukasumi kasuganoyama ni paya tatinikyeri
puyu sugwite paru kitaru rasi asapi sasu kasuganoyama ni kasumi tanabiku
ugupisu no paru ni naru rasi kasugayama kasumi tanabiku ywome ni miredomo
simogare no puyu no yanagwi pa miru pito no kadura ni su beku moyenikyeru kamo
asamidori somekaketari to miru madeni paru no yanagwi pa moyenikyeru kamo
yama no ma ni yuki pa puritutu sikasugani ko no kapayagwi pa moyenikyeru kamo
yama no ma no yuki pa kezu aru wo minagirapu kapa no yanagwi pa moyenikyeru kamo

sentence.transcription: yuki pa ke zu aru wo

block.header: asanaasana wa ga miru yanagwi ugupisu no kiwite naku beki mori ni paya nare
awoyagwi no ito no kupasisa parukaze ni midarenu ima ni misemu kwo moga mo
momosikwino opomiyapito no kadurakyeru sidariyanagwi pa miredo akanu kamo
ume no pana torimoti mireba wa ga yadwo no yanagwi no maywo si omopoyuru kamo
ugupisu no kotutapu ume no uturopeba sakura no pana no toki katamakenu
sakurabana toki pa sugwinedo miru pito no kwopwi no sakari to ima si tiru ramu
wa ga saseru yanagwi no ito wo pukimidaru kaze ni ka imo ga ume no tiru ramu
tosi no pa ni ume pa sakedomo utusemino yo no pito kimi si paru nakarikyeri
ututapeni tori pa pamanedo sime papete moramaku posiki ume no pana kamo
umanamete taka no yamapye wo sirwotape ni nipopasitaru pa ume no pana kamo
pana sakite mwi pa naranedomo nagaki ke ni omopoyuru kamo yamabuki no pana
notogapa no minasoko sapeni teru madeni mikasanoyama pa sakinikyeru kamo
yuki mireba imada puyu nari sikasugani parukasumi tati ume pa tiritutu
kozo sakisi pisagwi ima saku itadurani tuti ni ya otimu miru pito nasi ni
asipikwino yama no ma terasu sakurabana ko no parusame ni tiriyukamu kamo
utinabiku paru sariku rasi yama no ma no topoki konure no sakiyuku mireba

sentence.transcription: topo ki ko n ure no

block.header: kigisi naku takamatwo no pye ni sakurabana tirite nagarapu mimu pito moga mo
apoyama no sakura no pana pa kyepu mo ka mo tirimagapuramu miru pito nasi ni
kapadu naku yosinwonokapa no taki no upe no asibi no pana so pasi ni oku na yume
parusame ni araswopikanete wa ga yadwo no sakura no pana pa sakisomenikyeri
parusame pa itaku na puri so sakurabana imada minaku ni tiramaku wosi mo
paru sareba tiramaku wosiki ume no pana simasi pa sakazu pupumite moga mo
miwataseba kasuga no nwopye ni kasumi tati sakinipopyeru pa sakurabana kamo
itusikamo ko no ywo no akemu ugupisu no kotutapi tirasu ume no pana mimu

sentence.transcription: ko no ywo no ake mu

block.header: parukasumi tanabiku kyepu no yupudukuywo kiywoku teru ramu takamatu no nwo ni
paru sareba kwi no ko no kure no yupudukuywo opotukanasi mo yamakage nisite

sentence.transcription: kwi no ko no kure no

block.header: paru sareba kokage wo opomi yupudukuywo opotukanasi mo yamakage nisite
asagasumi parupi no kureba konoma ywori uturopu tukwi wo itu to ka matamu
paru no ame ni arikyeru monowo tatikakuri imo ga ipyedi ni ko no pi kurasitu
ima yukite kiku mono ni moga asukagapa parusame purite tagitu se no oto wo

sentence.transcription: tagi tu se no oto wo

block.header: kasuganwo ni keburi tatu miyu wotomyera si parunwo no upagwi tumite ni rasi mo
kasuganwo no asadi ga upe ni omopu dwoti aswobu ko no pi pa wasurayeme ya mo
parukasumi tatu kasuganwo wo yukikapyeri ware pa apimimu iya tosi no pa ni
paru no nwo ni kokoro nobemu to omopu dwoti kosi kyepu no pi pa kurezu mo aranu ka

sentence.transcription: ko si kyepu no pi pa
kure zu mo ara nu ka

block.header: momosikwino opomiyapito pa itwoma are ya ume wo kazasite koko ni tudwopyeru
puyu sugwite paru si kitareba tositukwi pa aratanaredomo pito pa puriyuku
mono mwina pa aratasiki yosi tadasikumo pito pa purinisi yorosikaru besi
suminoye no satwo yukisikaba parupanano iya medurasiki kimi ni apyeru kamo
kasuga n aru mikasanoyama ni tukwi mo idenu kamo sakwiyama ni sakyeru sakura no pana no miyu beku

sentence.transcription: pana no mi yu be ku

block.header: sirayuki no tune siku puyu pa sugwinikye rasi mo parukasumi tanabiku nwopye no ugupisu naku mo
wa ga yadwo no kemomo no sita ni tukuywo sasi sitakokoro yosi utate ko no koro
kasuganwo no tomougupisu no nakiwakare kapyerimasu ma mo omopose ware wo
puyugomori paru saku pana wo tawori moti titabi no kagiri kwopwiwataru kamo
paru yama no kwiri ni matwopyeru ugupisu mo ware ni masarite monomopame ya mo
idete miru mukapi no woka ni moto sigeku sakitaru pana no narazupa yamazi
kasumi tatu paru no nagapi wo kwopwikurasi ywo no pukenureba imo ni apanu kamo
paru sareba madu sakikusa no sakiku araba noti ni mo apamu na kwopwi so wagimo
paru sareba sidariyanagwi no towowoni mo imo pa kokoro ni norinikyeru kamo
paru sareba mozu no kayaguki miyezu tomo ware pa miyaramu kimi ga atari woba
kapotori no manaku sibanaku paru no nwo no kusane no sigeki kwopwi mo suru kamo
paru sareba unopana gutasi wa ga kwoyesi imo ga kakima pa arenikyeru kamo
ume no pana sakitiru sono ni ware yukamu kimi ga tukapi wo katamatigateri
pudinami no sakyeru paru no nwo ni papu kuzu no sita ywo si kwopwiba pisasiku mo aramu

sentence.transcription: sak yeru paru no nwo ni

block.header: paru no nwo ni kasumi tanabiki saku pana no kaku naru madeni apanu kimi kamo
wa ga sekwo ni wa ga kwopuraku pa okuyama no asibi no pana no ima sakari nari
ume no pana sidariyanagwi ni worimazipe pana ni maturaba kimi ni apamu kamo
wominapyesi sakinwo ni opuru siratutuzi siranu koto moti ipayesi wa ga se

sentence.transcription: ipa ye si wa ga se

block.header: ume no pana ware pa tirasazi awoniyosi nara n aru pito mo kitutu miru gane
kaku si araba nani ka uwekyemu yamabuki no yamu toki mo naku kwopuraku omopeba
paru sareba mikusa no upe ni oku simo no ketutu mo ware pa kwopwiwataru kamo
parukasumi yama ni tanabiki obobosiku imo wo apimite noti kwopwimu kamo
parukasumi tatinisi pi ywori kyepu madeni wa ga kwopwiyamazu moto no sigekyeba
parukasumi tatinisi pi ywori kyepu madeni wa ga kwopwiyamazu katamopi nisite
saniturapu imo wo omopu to kasumi tatu parupi mo kure ni kwopwiwataru kamo
tamakiparu wa ga yama no upe ni tatu kasumi tatu tomo u tomo kimi ga manima ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga yama no upe ni

block.header: miwataseba kasuga no nwopye ni tatu kasumi mimaku no posiki kimi ga sugata ka
kwopwitutu mo kyepu pa kurasitu kasumi tatu asu no parupi wo ikani kurasamu
wa ga sekwo ni kwopwite subye nami parusame no puru wakisirazu idete kosi kamo
imasarani kimi pa iyukazi parusame no kokoro wo pito no sirazu aranaku ni
parusame ni koromo pa itaku toporame ya nanuka si puraba nanuka kozi to ya
ume no pana tirasu parusame itaku puru tabi ni ya kimi ga ipori seru ramu
kunisura ga paruna tumu ramu siba no nwo no sibasiba kimi wo omopu ko no koro
parukusano sigeki wa ga kwopwi opoumi no pye ni yuku nami no tipye ni tumorinu
obobosiku kimi wo apimite suganoneno nagaki parupi wo kwopwiwataru kamo
ume no pana sakite tirinaba wagimokwo wo komu ka kozi ka to a pa matu no kwi so

sentence.transcription: ko mu ka kozi ka to
a pa matu no kwi so

block.header: siramayumi ima paruyama ni yuku kumo no yuki ya wakaremu kwoposiki monowo
masurawo ga pusiwi nagekite tukuritaru sidariyanagwi no kadura se wagimo
asatwode no kimi ga sugata wo yoku mizute nagaki parupi wo kwopwi ya kurasamu
paruyama no asibi no pana no nikukaranu kimi ni pa siweya yosayu tomo yosi
iswonokami puru no kamusugwi kamubwinisi ware ya sarasara kwopwi ni apinikyeru
sanwokata pa mwi ni narazu tomo pana nomwi ni sakite miyekoso kwopwi no nagusa ni
sanwokata pa mwi ni narinisi wo imasarani parusame purite pana sakame ya mo

sentence.transcription: mwi ni nari ni si wo

block.header: adusayumi pikitubye n aru nanoriso no pana saku madeni apanu kimi kamo
kapanope no itumo no pana no itu mo itu mo kimase wa ga sekwo tokizikyeme ya mo

sentence.transcription: toki zi kye me ya mo

block.header: parusame no yamazu purupuru wa ga kwopuru pito no me sura wo apimisenaku ni
wagimokwo ni kwopwitutu woreba parusame no sore mo siru goto yamazu puritutu
apiomopanu imo wo ya motona suganoneno nagaki parupi wo omopikurasamu
paru sareba madu naku tori no ugupisu no koto sakidatisi kimi wo si matamu
apiomopazu aru ramu kwo yuwe tamanowono nagaki parupi wo omopikurasaku

masurawo no idetatimukapu purusatwo no kamunabwiyama ni akekureba tumi no sayeda ni yupu sareba kwomatu ga ure ni satwobito no kikikwopuru made yamabikwo no apitoyomu made pototogisu tumagwopwi su rasi saywonaka ni naku
tabi nisite tumagwopwi su rasi pototogisu kamunabwiyama ni saywo pukete naku
pototogisu na ga patukowe pa ware ni moga satukwi no tama ni mazipete nukamu
asagasumi tanabiku nwopye ni asipikwino yamapototogisu itu ka kinakamu
asagwirino yapyeyama kwoyete ywobukwodori naki ya na ga kuru yadwo mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: yadwo mo ara na ku ni

block.header: pototogisu naku kowe kiku ya unopana no sakitiru woka ni kuzu piku wotomye
tukuywo yomi naku pototogisu mimaku pori ware kusatoreri mimu pito moga mo
pudinami no tiramaku wosimi pototogisu imakwi no woka wo nakite kwoyu nari
asagwirino yapyeyama kwoyete pototogisu unopanapye kara nakite kwoyekinu
kodakakupa katute kwi uwezi pototogisu kinakitoyomete kwopwimasarasimu
apikataki kimi ni apyeru ywo pototogisu atasitoki yu pa ima koso nakame
konokure no yupuyamwi naru ni pototogisu iduku wo ipye to nakiwataru ramu
konokure no yupuyamwi nareba pototogisu iduku wo ipye to nakiwataru ramu
pototogisu kyesa no asake ni nakituru pa kimi kikikyemu ka asai ka nekyemu

sentence.transcription: asa i ka ne kye mu

block.header: pototogisu panatatibana no yeda ni wite naki toyomoseba pana pa tiritutu
uretaki ya sikopototogisu ima kosoba kowe no karu gani kinakitoyomeme
koyopi no obotukanaki ni pototogisu naku naru kowe no oto no parukesa
satukwiyama unopana tukuywo pototogisu kikedomo akazu mata nakanu kamo
pototogisu kiwi mo nakanu ka wa ga yadwo no panatatibana no tuti ni otimu mimu

sentence.transcription: ki wi mo naka nu ka
tuti ni oti mu mi mu

block.header: pototogisu itopu toki nasi ayamyegusa kadura ni semu pi ko yu nakiwatare
yamato ni pa nakite ka ku ramu pototogisu na ga naku gotoni naki pito omopoyu
unopana no tiramaku wosimi pototogisu nwo ni ide yama ni iri kinaki toyomosu

sentence.transcription: nwo ni ide yama ni iri

block.header: tatibana no payasi wo uwemu pototogisu tune ni puyu made sumiwataru gane
amabare no kumo ni tagupite pototogisu kasuga wo sasite ko yu nakiwataru
monomopu to inenu asake ni pototogisu nakite sawataru subye naki madeni
wa ga kinu wo kimi ni kiseyo to pototogisu ware wo unagasu swode ni kiwitutu
moto tu pito pototogisu woba medurasimi ima ka na ga kuru kwopwitutu woreba
kaku bakari ame no puraku ni pototogisu unopanayama ni napo ka naku ramu
moda mo aramu toki mo nakanamu pigurasi no monomopu toki ni nakitutu motona
omopu kwo ga koromo suramu ni nipopikoso sima no paripara aki tatazu tomo
kaze ni tiru panatatibana wo swode ni ukete kimi ga miatwo to omopituru kamo
kagupasiki panatatibana wo tama ni nuki okuramu imo pa miturete mo aru ka
pototogisu kinaki toyomosu tatibana no pana tiru nipa wo mimu pito ya tare
wa ga yadwo no panatatibana pa tirinikyeri kuyasiki toki ni apyeru kimi kamo
miwataseba mukapi no nwobye no nadesikwo no tiramaku wosi mo ame na puri sone
amama akete kunimi mo semu wo purusatwo no panatatibana pa tirinikyemu kamo

sentence.transcription: kuni mi mo se mu wo

block.header: nwobye mireba nadesikwo no pana sakinikyeri wa ga matu aki pa tikaduku rasi mo
wagimokwoni aputi no pana pa tirisugwizu ima sakyeru goto arikosenu kamo
kasuganwo no pudi pa tirinite nani wo ka mo mikari no pito no worite kazasamu
tokizikuno tama wo so nukyeru unopana no satukwi wo mataba pisasiku aru bemi
unopana no sakitiru woka yu pototogisu nakite sawataru kimi pa kikitu ya
kikitu ya to kimi ga twopaseru pototogisu sinwonwoni nurete ko yu nakiwataru
tatibana no pana tiru satwo ni kaywopinaba yamapototogisu toyomosamu kamo
paru sareba sugaru naru nwo no pototogisu potopoto imo ni apazu kinikyeri
satukwiyama panatatibana ni pototogisu komorapu toki ni apyeru kimi kamo
pototogisu kinaku satukwi no mizikaywo mo pitori si nureba akasikanetu mo
pigurasi pa toki to nakedomo kwopwisiku ni tawayamye ware pa toki wakazu naku
pitogoto pa natunwo no kusa no sigeku tomo imo to ware to si tadusapari neba
ko no koro no kwopwi no sigekyeku natukusa no kariparapedomo opwisiku gotosi
makuzu papu natunwo no sigeku kaku kwopwiba makoto wa ga inoti tune narame ya mo
ware nomwi ya kaku kwopwi su ramu kakitupata niturapu imo pa ikani ka aru ramu
katayori ni ito wo so wa ga yoru wa ga sekwo ga panatatibana wo nukamu to mopite

sentence.transcription: ito wo so wa ga yoru

block.header: ugupisu no kaywopu kakine no unopana no uki koto are ya kimi ga kimasanu
unopana no saku to pa nasi ni aru pito ni kwopwi ya wataramu katamopi nisite

sentence.transcription: saku to pa na si ni

block.header: ware kosoba nikuku mo arame wa ga yadwo no panatatibana wo mi ni pa kozi to ya

sentence.transcription: mi ni pa kozi to ya

block.header: pototogisu kinaki toyomosu wokapye n aru pudinami mi ni pa kimi pa kozi to ya
komori nomwi kwopureba kurusi nadesikwo no pana ni sakideyo asanasana mimu
yoso nomwi ni mitutu kwopwi semu kurenawi no suwetumupana no iro ni idezu tomo
natukusa no tuyuwakekoromo tukenaku ni wa ga koromode no puru toki mo naki
minadukwi no tuti sape sakete teru pi ni mo wa ga swode pwime ya kimi ni apazusite

sentence.transcription: wa ga swode pwi me ya

block.header: ama no gapa minasoko sapeni terasu pune patesi punabito imo ni miyeki ya

sentence.transcription: imo ni mi ye ki ya

block.header: pisakatano ama no kapara ni nuyedorino uranakemasitu subye naki madeni
wa ga kwopwi wo tuma pa sireru wo yukupuneno sugwite ku besi ya koto mo tugenamu
akarapiku irogupasi kwo wo sibamireba pitoduma yuweni ware kwopwinu besi
ama no gapa yasu no watari ni pune ukete aki tatimatu to imo ni tugekoso
opozwora yu kaywopu ware sura nare yuweni ama no kapadi wo nadumite zo kosi
yatipoko no kamwi no miyo ywori tomosi duma pito sirinikyeri tugite si omopeba
wa ga kwopuru ninopo no omowa koyopi mo ka ama no kapara ni ipamakura maku

sentence.transcription: ni no po no omo wa

block.header: onoduma wo tomosimu kwora pa patemu tu no ariswo makite nemu kimi matikateni
ame tuti to wakaresi toki yu onoduma pa sika zo tosi ni aru aki matu ware pa
pikwoposi pa nagekasu tuma ni koto dani mo tuge ni zo kituru mireba kurusimi
pisakatano ama tu sirusi to minasigapa pyedate ni okisi kamuyo si uramyesi
nubatamano ywogwiri gakurete topokyedomo imo ga tutape pa payaku tugekoso
na ga kwopuru imo no mikoto pa akidarani swode puru miyetu kumogakuru made
yuputudu mo kaywopu amadi wo itu made ka apugite matamu tukwipitowotokwo
ama no gapa imukapitatite kwopu ramu ni koto dani tugemu tuma to ipu made pa
siratama no ipotutudwopi wo toki mo mizu a pa posikatenu apamu pi matu ni
ama no gapa midukagekusa no akikaze ni nabiku wo mireba toki pa kinikyeri
a ga matisi akipagwi sakinu ima dani mo nipopi ni yukana wotikatapito ni
wa ga sekwo ni uragwopwi woreba ama no gapa ywopune kogu naru kadi no oto kikoyu
make nagaku kwopuru kokoro yu akikaze ni imo ga oto kikoyu pimo tokiyukana
kwopwisiku pa kenagaki monowo ima dani mo tomosimu besi ya apu beki ywo dani
ama no gapa kozo no wataride uturopeba kapase wo pumu ni ywo so pukenikyeru
inisipye yu agetesi pata mo kapyerimizu ama no kapadu ni tosi zo penikyeru
ama no gapa ywopune wo kogite akenu tomo apamu to mope ya swode kapezu aramu
topotuma to tamakura kapete sanuru ywo pa kakye pa na naki so akeba akenu tomo
apimiraku akidaranedomo inanome no akesarinikyeri punade semu tuma
sanesomete ikuda mo araneba sirwotapeno obi kopu besi ya kwopwi mo sugwineba
yoroduyo ni tadusapariwite apimi tomo omopisugu beki kwopwi ni aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: kwopwi ni ara na ku ni

block.header: yoroduyo ni teru beki tukwi mo kumogakuri kurusiki mono zo apamu to omopedo
sirakumo no ipopye gakurite topokyedomo yworu sarazu mimu imo ga atari pa
wa ga tameto tanabata tu mye no so no yadwo ni oru sirwotape pa oritekyemu kamo
kimi ni apazu pisasiki toki yu oru pata no sirwotapekoromo akaduku madeni
ama no gapa kadi no oto kikoyu pikwoposi to tanabata tu mye to koyopi apu rasi mo

sentence.transcription: ko yopi apu ra si mo

block.header: aki sareba kapagwiri tateru ama no gapa kapa ni mukiwite kwopuru ywo so opoki
yosiweyasi tadanarazu tomo nuyedorino uranake wori to tugemu kwo moga mo

sentence.transcription: tuge mu kwo mo ga mo

block.header: pitotose ni nanuka no ywo nomwi apu pito no kwopwi mo sugwineba ywo pa pukeyuku mo

sentence.transcription: ywo pa puke yu ku mo

block.header: pitotose ni nanuka no ywo nomwi apu pito no kwopwi mo tukwineba saywo so akenikyeru

sentence.transcription: sa ywo so ake ni kyeru

block.header: ama no gapa yasu no kapara ni todomarite
tanabata no ipopata tatete oru nunwo no akisarikoromo tare ka torimimu
tosi ni arite ima ka makuramu nubatamano ywogwirigakuri ni topoduma no te wo
wa ga matisi aki pa kitarinu imo to ware nanigoto are so pimo tokazaramu
tosi no kwopwi koyopi tukusite asu ywori pa tune no gotoku ya wa ga kwopwi woramu
apanaku pa kenagaki monowo ama no gapa pyedatete mata ya wa ga kwopwi woramu
kwopwisikyeku kenagaki monowo apu bekaru yopi dani kimi ga kimasazaru ramu
pikwoposi to tanabata tu mye to koyopi apu ama no kapatwo ni nami tatu na yume
akikaze no pukitadayopasu sirakumo pa tanabata tu mye no ama tu pire kamo
sibasiba mo apiminu kimi wo ama no gapa punade paya seyo ywo no pukenu ma ni

sentence.transcription: ywo no puke nu ma ni

block.header: akikaze no kiywoki yupubye ni ama no gapa pune kogiwataru tukwipitowotokwo
ama no gapa kwiri tatiwatari pikwoposi no kadi no oto kikoyu ywo no pukeyukeba
kimi ga pune ima kogiku rasi ama no gapa kwiri tatiwataru ko no kapa no se ni

sentence.transcription: ko no kapa no se ni

block.header: akikaze ni kapanami tatinu simasiku pa ya swo no punatu ni mipune todomeyo

sentence.transcription: ya swo no puna tu ni

block.header: ama no gapa kapa no oto kiywosi pikwoposi no aki kogu pune no nami no sawaki ka
ama no gapa kapatwo ni tatite wa ga kwopwisi kimi kimasu nari pimo toki matamu
ama no gapa kapa ni mukitati wa ga kwopwisi kimi kimasu nari pimo toki matamu
ama no gapa kapatwo ni worite tositukwi wo kwopwikosi kimi ni koyopi apu kamo
asu ywori pa wa ga tamatoko wo utiparapi kimi to pa inezu pitori ka mo nemu

sentence.transcription: kimi to pa i ne zu
pito ri ka mo ne mu

block.header: ama no para yukite wo imu to siramayumi pikite kakuseru tukwipitowotokwo
ko no yupubye purikuru ame pa pikwoposi no paya kogu pune no kai no tiri kamo
ama no gapa yaswose kwirapyeri pikwoposi no toki matu pune pa ima si kogu rasi
kaze pukite kapanami tatinu pikipune ni watari mo konu ka ywo no pukenu ma ni

sentence.transcription: ywo no puke nu ma ni

block.header: ama no gapa topoki watari pa nakyeredomo kimi ga punade pa tosi ni koso mate
ama no gapa utipasi watasi imo ga ipyedi yamazu kaywopamu toki matazu tomo
tukwi kasane wa ga omopu imo ni apyeru ywo pa ima si nanaywo wo tugikosenu kamo
tosi ni yosopu wa ga pune kogamu ama no gapa kaze pa puku tomo nami tatu na yume
ama no gapa nami pa tatu tomo wa ga pune pa iza kogiidemu ywo no pukenu ma ni

sentence.transcription: ywo no puke nu ma ni

block.header: tada koyopi apitaru kwora ni kotodopi mo imada sezusite saywo so akenikyeru

sentence.transcription: sa ywo so ake ni kyeru

block.header: ama no gapa siranami takasi wa ga kwopuru kimi ga punade pa ima si su rasi mo

sentence.transcription: ima si su ra si mo

block.header: patamono no manekwi motiyukite ama no gapa utipasi watasu kimi ga komu tame
ama no gapa kwiri tatinoboru tanabata no kumo no koromo no kapyeru swode kamo
inisipye ni oritesi pata wo ko no yupubye koromo ni nupite kimi matu ware wo
asidama mo tadama mo yurani oru pata wo kimi ga mikyesi ni nupiapemu kamo
tukwipi eri apite si areba wakaremaku wosikaru kimi pa asu sape moga mo
ama no gapa watarize pukami pune ukete kogikuru kimi ga kadi no oto kikoyu
ama no para purisakemireba ama no gapa kwiri tatiwataru kimi pa kinu rasi
ama no gapa se gotoni nusa wo tatematuru kokoro pa kimi wo sakiku kimase to
pisakatano ama no kapadu ni pune ukete kimi matu ywora pa akezu mo aranu ka

sentence.transcription: ake zu mo ara nu ka

block.header: ama no gapa asi nure watari kimi ga te mo imada makaneba ywo no pukenuraku
watarimori pune watase wo to ywobu kowe no itaraneba ka mo kadi no oto no senu

sentence.transcription: kadi no oto no se nu

block.header: make nagaku kapa ni mukitati arisi swode koyopi makamu to omopaku ga yosa
ama no gapa watarize gotoni omopitutu kosiku mo sirusi apyeraku omopeba
pito sape ya mitugazu aramu pikwoposi no tuma ywobu pune no tikadukiyuku wo
pito sape ya mitutu aru ramu pikwoposi no tuma ywobu pune no tikadukiyuku wo
ama no gapa se wo payami ka mo nubatamano ywo pa akenitutu apanu pikwoposi

sentence.transcription: se wo paya mi ka mo

block.header: watarimori pune paya watase pitotose ni putatabi kaywopu kimi ni aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: kimi ni ara na ku ni

block.header: tamakadura tayenu monokara sanuraku pa tosi no watari ni tada pitoywo nomwi
kwopuru pi pa kenagaki monowo koyopi dani tomosimu besi ya apu beki monowo
tanabata no koyopi apinaba tune no goto asu wo pyedatete tosi pa nagakyemu
ama no gapa tanapasi watase tanabata no iwatarasamu ni tanapasi watase
ama no gapa kapatwo ya swo ari iduku ni ka kimi ga mipune wo wa ga mati woramu
akikaze no pukinisi pi ywori ama no gapa se ni idetatite matu to tugekoso
ama no gapa kozo no watarize arenikyeri kimi ga kimasamu miti no siranaku
ama no gapa seze ni siranami takakyedomo tada watarikinu mataba kurusimi
pikwoposi no tuma ywobu pune no pikituna no tayemu to kimi wo wa ga omopanaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga omopa na ku ni

block.header: watarimori punade si idemu koyopi nomwi apimite noti pa apazi mono kamo
wa ga kakuseru kadisawo nakute watarimori pune kasame ya mo simasi pa arimate

ametuti no pazime no toki yu ama no gapa imukapi worite pitotose ni putatabi apanu tumagwopwi ni monoomopu pito ama no gapa yasu no kapara no arigaywopu ide no watari ni sopobune no tomo ni mo pe ni mo punayosopi makadi sizinuki patasusuki motopa mo soyoni akikaze no pukikuru yopi ni ama no gapa siranami sinwogi otitagitu payase watarite wakakusano tuma ga te maku to opobuneno omopitanomite kogiku ramu so no tuma no kwo ga aratamano tosinowo nagaku omopikosi kwopwi wo tukusamu pumitukwi no nanuka no yopi pa ware mo kanasi mo

sentence.transcription: tomo ni mo pe ni mo
so no tuma no kwo ga

block.header: komanisiki pimo tokikapasi amepito no tumadopu yopi zo ware mo sinwopamu
pikwoposi no kapase wo wataru sawobune no iyukite patemu kapadu si omopoyu

ametuti to wakaresi toki yu pisakatano ama tu sirusi to sadametesi ama no kapara ni aratamano tukwi wo kasanete imo ni apu toki samorapu to tatimatu ni wa ga koromode ni akikaze no pukikapyerapeba tatite wite tadwoki wo sirani murakimono kokoro isaywopi tokikinuno omopimidarete itu si ka to wa ga matu koyopi ko no kapa no nagare no nagaku arikosenu kamo
imo ni apu toki katamatu to pisakatano ama no kapara ni tukwi zo penikyeru
sawosika no kokoro apiomopu akipagwi no sigure no puru ni tiraku si wosi mo
yupu sareba nwopye no akipagwi ure wakami tuyu ni so karuru aki matigateni
makuzupara nabiku akikaze puku gotoni ada no oponwo no pagwi no pana tiru
karigane no kinakamu pi made mitutu aramu ko no pagwipara ni ame na puri sone
okuyama ni sumu to pu sika no yopi sarazu tumadopu pagwi no tiramaku wosi mo
siratuyu no okamaku wosimi akipagwi wo wori nomwi worite oki ya karasamu
akita karu karipo no yadwo no nipopu made sakyeru akipagwi miredo akanu kamo
wa ga koromo sureru ni pa arazu takamatu no nwopye yukisikaba pagwi no sureru so

sentence.transcription: sur eru ni pa ara zu
pagwi no sur e ru so

block.header: ko no yupupye akikaze pukinu siratuyu ni araswopu pagwi no asu sakamu mimu
akikaze pa suzusiku narinu uma namete iza nwo ni yukana pagwi no pana mi ni
asagapo pa asatuyu opite saku to ipedo yupukage ni koso sakimasarikyere
paru sareba kasumigakurite miyezarisi akipagwi sakinu worite kazasamu
sanukata no nwopye no akipagwi toki nareba ima sakari nari worite kazasamu
kotosarani koromo pa surazi wominapyesi sakinwo no pagwi ni nipopite woramu
akikaze pa twoku twoku pukiko pagwi no pana tiramaku wosimi kipopitatu mimu

sentence.transcription: two ku two ku puki ko

block.header: wa ga yadwo no pagwi no ure nagasi akikaze no pukinamu toki ni sakamu to omopite
pito mwina pa pagwi wo aki to ipu yosi ware pa wobana ga ure wo aki to pa ipamu
tamadusano kimi ga tukapi no taworikyeru ko no akipagwi pa miredo akanu kamo
wa ga yadwo ni sakyeru akipagwi tune naraba wa ga matu pito ni misemasi monowo
takiswonape uwesi mo siruku ide mireba yadwo no wasapagwi sakinikyeru kamo
wa ga yadwo ni uweopositaru akipagwi wo tare ka sime sasu ware ni sirayezu
te ni toreba swode sape nipopu wominapyesi ko no siratuyu ni tiramaku wosi mo
siratuyu ni araswopikanete sakyeru pagwi tiraba wosikyemu ame na puri sone
wotomyerani yukiapi no wase wo karu toki ni narinikye rasi mo pagwi no pana saku

sentence.transcription: nari ni kye ra si mo

block.header: asagwiri no tanabiku wonwo no pagwi no pana ima ka tiru ramu imada akanaku ni
kwopwisikupa katami ni seyo to wa ga sekwo ga uwesi akipagwi pana sakinikyeri
akipagwi ni kwopwitukusazi to omopedomo siweya atarasi mata mo apame ya mo

sentence.transcription: mata mo apa me ya mo

block.header: akikaze pa pinikyeni pukinu takamatwo no nwopye no akipagwi tiramaku wosi mo
masurawo no kokoro pa nasi ni akipagwi no kwopwi nomwi ni ya mo nadumite arinamu
wa ga matisi aki pa kitarinu sikaredomo pagwi no pana so mo imada sakazukyeru
mimaku pori wa ga matikwopwisi akipagwi pa yeda mo simimini pana sakinikyeri
kasuganwo no pagwi pa tirinaba asakoti no kaze ni tagupite koko ni tirikone
akipagwi pa kari ni apazi to ipyereba ka kowe wo kikite pa pana ni tirinuru
akipagwi pa kari ni apazi to ipyere ka mo kowe wo kikite pa pana ni tirinuru
aki saraba imo ni misemu to uwesi pagwi tuyusimo opite tirinikyeru kamo
akikaze ni yamato pye kwoyuru karigane pa iya topozakaru kumogakuritutu
akegure no asagwiri gomori nakite yuku kari pa wa ga kwopwi imo ni tugekoso
wa ga yadwo ni nakisi karigane kumo no upe ni koyopi naku nari kunipye ka mo yuku
sawosika no tumadopu toki ni tukwi wo yomi karigane kikoyu ima si ku rasi mo
amakumo no yoso ni karigane kikisi ywori padaresimo puri samusi ko no ywo pa

sentence.transcription: samu si ko no ywo pa

block.header: amakumo no yoso ni karigane kikisi ywori iya masumasuni kwopwi koso masare
aki no ta no wa ga karibaka no sugwinureba karigane kikoyu puyu katamakete
asibye n aru wogwi no pa sayagi akikaze no pukikuru napeni kari nakiwataru
asibye n aru wogwi no pa sayagi akikaze ni karigane kikoyu ima si ku rasi mo

sentence.transcription: ima si ku ra si mo

block.header: ositeru nanipa poriye no asipye ni pa kari netaru kamo simo no puraku ni
akikaze ni yama tobikwoyuru karigane no kowe topozakaru kumogakuru rasi
tutwoni yuku kari no naku ne pa wa ga gotoku monoomope ka mo kowe no kanasiki
tadugane no kyesa naku napeni karigane pa iduku sasite ka kumogakureramu
nubatamano ywo wataru kari pa opoposiku ikuywo wo pete ka ono ga na wo noru
aratamano tosi no peyukeba adomopu to ywo wataru ware wo twopu pito ya tare
ko no koro no aki no asake ni kwirigomori tuma ywobu sika no kowe no sayakesa
sawosika no tuma totonopu to naku kowe no itaramu kipami nabikye pagwipara
kimi ni kwopwi urabure woreba siki no nwo no akipagwi sinwogi sawosika naku mo
kari kureba pagwi pa tirinu to sawosika no naku naru kowe mo uraburenikyeri
akipagwi no kwopwi mo tukwineba sawosika no kowe itugi itugi kwopwi koso masare
yama tikaku ipye ya woru beki sawosika no kowe wo kikitutu inekatenu kamo
yama no pye ni iyuku satuwo pa sapani aredo yama ni mo nwo ni mo sawosika naku mo

sentence.transcription: yama ni mo nwo ni mo

block.header: asipikwino yama ywori kiseba sawosika no tuma ywobu kowe wo kikamasi monowo
yamapye ni pa satuwo no nerapi kasikwokyedo wosika naku nari tuma ga me wo pori
akipagwi no tiriyuku mireba opoposimi tumagwopwi su rasi sawosika naku mo
yama topoki miyakwo ni si areba sawosika no tuma ywobu kowe pa tomosiku mo aru ka
akipagwi no tirisugwiyukaba sawosika pa wabwinaki semu na mizupa tomosimi
akipagwi no sakitaru nwopye pa sawosika so tuyu wo waketutu tumadopi sikyeru
na zo sika no wabwinaki su naru kedasiku mo akinwo no pagwi ya sigeku tiru ramu
akipagwi no sakitaru nwopye ni sawosika pa tiramaku wosimi nakiyuku monowo
asipikwino yama no tokage ni naku sika no kowe kikasu ya mo yamata morasu kwo
yupukage ni kinaku pigurasi kokodaku mo pi gotoni kikedo akanu kowe kamo
akikaze no samuku puku nape wa ga yadwo no asadi ga moto ni koporogi naku mo
kagekusa no opwitaru yadwo no yupukage ni naku koporogi pa kikedo akanu kamo
nipakusa ni murasame purite koporogi no naku kowe kikeba akidukinikyeri
miyosinwo no ipamoto sarazu naku kapadu ube mo nakikyeri kapa wo sayakemi
kamunabwi no yamasita toyomi yuku midu ni kapadu naku nari aki to ipamu to ya

sentence.transcription: aki to ipa mu to ya

block.header: kusamakura tabi ni monomopi wa ga kikeba yupu katamakete naku kapadu kamo
se wo payami otitagititaru siranami ni kapadu naku nari asayopi gotoni
kami tu se ni kapadu tuma ywobu yupu sareba koromode samumi tuma makamu to ka
imogatewo torosi no ike no nami no ma yu tori ga ne kyeni naku aki sugwinu rasi
aki no nwo no wobana ga ure ni naku mozu no kowe kikikyemu ka katakiku wagimo
akipagwi ni okyeru siratuyu asanasana tama to si so miru okyeru siratuyu

sentence.transcription: tama to si so mi ru

block.header: yupudati no ame puru gotoni kasuganwo no wobana ga upe no siratuyu omopoyu
yupudati no ame utipureba kasuganwo no wobana ga upe no siratuyu omopoyu
akipagwi no yeda mo towowoni tuyusimo oki samuku mo toki pa narinikyeru kamo
siratuyu to aki no pagwi to pa kwopwimidare waku koto kataki wa ga kokoro kamo
wa ga yadwo no wobana osinabe oku tuyu ni te pure wagimokwo tiramaku mo mimu
siratuyu wo toraba kenu besi iza kwodomo tuyu ni kipopite pagwi no aswobi semu
akita karu karipo wo tukuri wa ga woreba koromode samuku tuyu so okinikyeru
ko no koro no akikaze samusi pagwi no pana tirasu siratuyu okinikye rasi mo

sentence.transcription: oki ni kye ra si mo

block.header: akita karu ipo ugoku nari siratuyu si oku poda nasi to tuge ni kinu rasi

sentence.transcription: oku po da na si to

block.header: akita karu ipo ugoku nari siratuyu si oku poda nasi to tuge ni ku rasi mo

sentence.transcription: oku po da na si to

block.header: paru pa moye natu pa midori ni kurenawi no simiiro ni miyuru aki no yama kamo
tumagomoru yanwo no kamuyama tuyusimo ni nipopisometari tiramaku wosi mo
asatuyu ni nipopisometaru akiyama ni sigure na puri so ariwataru gane
nagatukwi no sigure no ame ni nuretopori kasuganoyama pa irodukinikyeri
karigane no samuki asake no tuyu na rasi kasuganoyama wo nipopasu mono pa
ko no koro no akatokituyu ni wa ga yadwo no pagwi no sitaba pa irodukinikyeri
karigane pa ima pa kinakinu wa ga matisi momiti paya tugye mataba kurusi mo
akiyama wo yume pito kaku na wasurenisi so no momitiba no omopoyuraku ni
oposaka wo wa ga kwoyekureba putakami ni momitiba nagaru sigure puritutu
aki sareba oku siratuyu ni wa ga kadwo no asadi ga uraba irodukinikyeri
imo ga swode makiki no yama no asatuyu ni nipopu momiti no tiramaku wosi mo
momitiba no nipopi pa sigesi sikaredomo tuma nasi no kwi wo tawori kazasamu
tuyusimono samuki yupupye no akikaze ni momitinikyeri mo tuma nasi no kwi pa
wa ga kadwo no asadi iroduku yonabari no namisiba no nwo no momiti tiru rasi
karigane wo kikituru napeni takamatu no nwo no upe no kusa so irodukinikyeru

sentence.transcription: nwo no upe no kusa so

block.header: wa ga sekwo ga sirwotapekoromo yukipureba nipopinu beku mo momitu yama kamo
akikaze no pinikyeni pukeba midukukwino woka no konopa mo irodukinikyeri

sentence.transcription: woka no ko no pa mo

block.header: karigane no kinakisi napeni karakoromo tatutanoyama pa momiti sometari
karigane no kowe kiku napeni asu ywori pa kasuganoyama pa momiti somenamu
sigure no ame manaku si pureba makwi no pa mo araswopikanete irodukinikyeri
itisirwoku sigure no ame pa puranaku ni opokwinoyama pa irodukinikyeri
kaze pukeba momiti tiritutu sukunaku mo aga no matubara kiywokaranaku ni
monomopu to komorapi worite kyepu mireba kasuganoyama pa irodukinikyeri
nagatukwi no siratuyu opite asipikwino yama no momitamu mimaku si mo yosi

sentence.transcription: mi maku si mo yo si

block.header: imogari to uma ni kura okite ikwomayama utikwoyekureba momiti tiritutu
momiti suru toki ni naru rasi tukwipito no katura no yeda no iroduku mireba
satwo gotoni simo pa oku rasi takamatu no nwoyamadukasa no iroduku mireba
akikaze no pinikyeni pukeba tuyu sigemi pagwi no sitaba pa irodukinikyeri
akipagwi no sitaba momitinu aratamano tukwi no penureba kaze wo itami ka mo

sentence.transcription: kaze wo ita mi ka mo

block.header: maswokagami minabutiyama pa kyepu mo ka mo siratuyu okite momiti tiru ramu
wa ga yadwo no asadi iroduku yonabari no natumwi no upe ni sigure puru rasi
karigane no samuku nakisi yu midukukwino woka no kuzupa pa irodukinikyeri
akipagwi no sitaba no momiti pana ni tugi toki sugwiyukaba noti kwopwimu kamo
asukagapa momitiba nagaru kadurakwi no yama no konopa pa ima si tiru ramu

sentence.transcription: yama no ko no pa pa

block.header: imo ga pimo toku to musubite tatutayama ima koso momiti pazimete arikyere
karigane no samuku nakisi yu kasuga n aru mikasanoyama pa irodukinikyeri
ko no koro no akatokituyu ni wa ga yadwo no aki no pagwipara irodukinikyeri
yupu sareba kari no kwoyeyuku tatutayama sigure ni kipopi irodukinikyeri
saywo pukete sigure na puri so akipagwi no motopa no momiti tiramaku wosi mo
purusatwo no patumomitiba wo taworimoti kyepu so wa ga kosi minu pito no tame

sentence.transcription: kyepu so wa ga ko si

block.header: kimi ga ipye no momitiba payaku tirinikyeri sigure no ame ni nurenikye rasi mo
pitotose ni putatabi yukanu akiyama wo kokoro ni akazu sugusituru kamo
asipikino yamata tukuru kwo pidezu tomo sime dani papeyo moru to siru gane
sawosika no tuma ywobu yama no wokapye n aru wasada pa karazi simo pa puru tomo
wa ga kadwo ni moru ta wo mireba sapo no uti no akipagwi susuki omopoyuru kamo
yupusarazu kapadu naku naru miwagapa no kiywoki se no oto wo kikaku si yosi mo

sentence.transcription: kiywo ki se no oto wo

block.header: ame no umi ni tukwi no pune uke katurakadi kakete kogu miyu tukwipitowotokwo
ko no ywora pa saywo pukenu rasi karigane no kikoyuru swora yu tukwi tatiwataru
wa ga sekwo ga kazasi no pagwi ni oku tuyu wo sayakani miyo to tukwi pa teru rasi
kokoro naki aki no tukuywo no monomopu to i no nerayenu ni teritutu motona
omopanu ni sigure no ame pa puritaredo amakumo parete tukuywo sayakesi
pagwi no pana saki no wowori wo miyo to ka mo tukuywo no kiywoki kwopwimasaraku ni
siratuyu wo tama ni nasitaru nagatukwi no ariake no tukuywo miredo akanu kamo
kwopwitutu mo inaba kakiwake ipyeworeba tomosiku mo arazu aki no yupukaze
pagwi no pana sakitaru nwopye ni pigurasi no naku naru napeni aki no kaze puku
akiyama no konopa mo imada momitaneba kyesa puku kaze pa simo mo okinu beku

sentence.transcription: simo mo oki nu be ku

block.header: takamatu no ko no mine mo seni kasa tatete mitisakaritaru aki no ka no yosa

sentence.transcription: ko no mine mo se ni
aki no ka no yo sa

block.header: pitopi ni pa tipye sikusikuni wa ga kwopuru imo ga atari ni sigure puru miyu
akita karu tabi no ipori ni sigure puri wa ga swode nurenu posu pito nasi ni
tamatasuki kakenu toki nasi wa ga kwopwi pa sigure si puraba nuretutu mo yukamu
momitiba wo tirasu sigure no puru napeni ywo sape so samuki pitori si nureba
amatobu ya kari no tubasa no opopiba no iduku morite ka simo no purikyemu
akiyama no sitapi ga sita ni naku tori no kowe dani kikaba nani ka nagekamu
ta so kare to ware wo na twopi so nagatukwi no tuyu ni nuretutu kimi matu ware wo
aki no ywo no kwiri tatiwatari opoposiku ime ni so mituru imo ga sugata wo
aki no nwo no wobana ga ure no opwinabiki kokoro pa imo ni yorinikyeru kamo
akiyama ni simo puriopopi konopa tiri tosi pa yuku tomo ware wasureme ya
suminoye no kwisi wo ta ni pari makisi ine no sate karu madeni apanu kimi kamo
tatinosiri tamamaki tawi ni itu made ka imo wo apimizu ipye kwopwi woramu
aki no ta no po no upe ni okyeru siratuyu no kenu beku mo a pa omopoyuru kamo

sentence.transcription: po no upe ni ok yeru
ke nu be ku mo a pa

block.header: aki no ta no pomuki no yoreru katayori ni ware pa monomopu ture naki monowo
akita karu karipo wo tukuri ipori site aru ramu kimi wo mimu yosi moga mo
tadugane no kikoyuru tawi ni ipori site ware tabi ni ari to imo ni tugekoso
parukasumi tanabiku tawi ni ipo tukite akita karu made omopasimuraku
tatibanawo moribye no satwo no kadwo tawase karu toki sugwinu kozi to su rasi mo
akipagwi no sakitiru nwopye no yuputuyu ni nuretutu kimase ywo pa pukenu tomo
irodukapu aki no tuyusimo na puri sone imo ga tamoto wo makanu koyopi pa
akipagwi no upe ni okitaru siratuyu no ke ka mo sinamasi kwopwitutu arazupa
wa ga yadwo no akipagwi no upe ni oku tuyu no itisirwoku si mo ware kwopwime ya mo
aki no po wo sinwoni osinabe oku tuyu no ke ka mo sinamasi kwopwitutu arazupa
tuyusimo ni koromode nurete ima dani mo imogari yukana ywo pa pukenu tomo
akipagwi no yeda mo towowoni oku tuyu no ke ka mo sinamasi kwopwitutu arazupa
akipagwi no upe ni siratuyu oku gotoni mitutu so sinwopu kimi ga sugata wo
wagimokwo pa koromo ni aranamu akikaze no samuki ko no koro sita ni kimasi wo
patusekaze kaku puku yopi pa itu made ka koromo katasiki wa ga pitori nemu

sentence.transcription: wa ga pito ri ne mu

block.header: akipagwi wo tirasu nagame no puru koro pa pitori okwiwite kwopuru ywo so opoki
nagatukwi no sigure no ame no yamagwiri no ibuseki a ga mune ta wo miba yamamu
kamunadukwi sigure no ame puri yamagwiri no ibuseki a ga mune ta wo miba yamamu
koporogi no matiyorokoburu aki no ywo wo nuru sirusi nasi makura to ware pa
asagasumi kapwiya ga sita ni naku kapadu kowe dani kikaba ware kwopwime ya mo
idete inaba amatobu kari no nakinu bemi kyepu kyepu to ipu ni tosi so penikyeru
sawosika no asa pusu wonwo no kusa wakami kakuropikanete pito ni sirayu na
sawosika no wonwo no kusabusi itisirwoku wa ga twopanaku ni pito no sireraku
koyopi no akatoki kutati naku tadu no omopi pa sugwizu kwopwi koso masare
miti no pye no wobana ga sita no omopigusa imasarani nado mono ka omopamu
kusa pukami koporogi sapani naku yadwo no pagwi mi ni kimi pa itu ka kimasamu
akidukeba mikusa no pana no ayenu gani omopedo sirazi tadani apazareba
nani su to ka kimi wo itopamu akipagwi no so no patupana no uresiki monowo
koimarobi kwopwi pa sinu tomo itisirwoku iro ni pa idezi asagapo no pana
koto ni idete ipaba yuyusimi asagapo no po ni pa sakidenu kwopwi mo suru kamo

sentence.transcription: po ni pa saki de nu

block.header: karigane no patukowe kikite sakidetaru yadwo no akipagwi mi ni ko wa ga sekwo

sentence.transcription: mi ni ko wa ga sekwo

block.header: sawosikano irinwo no susuki patuwobana itu si ka imo ga te wo makurakamu
kwopuru pi no kenagaku areba wa ga sono no karaawi no pana no iro ni idenikyeri
wa ga satwo ni ima saku pana no wominapyesi apenu kokoro ni napo kwopwinikyeri
pagwi no pana sakyeru wo mireba kimi ni apazu makoto mo pisani narinikyeru kamo
asatuyu ni sakisusabwitaru tukwikusa no pi kururu napeni kenu beku omopoyu
nagaki ywo wo kimi ni kwopwitutu ikyerazupa sakite tirinisi pana naramasi wo
wagimokwoni apusakayama no padasusuki po ni pa sakidezu kwopwiwataru kamo

sentence.transcription: po ni pa saki de zu

block.header: yukurinaku ima mo migaposi akipagwi no sinapi ni aramu imo ga sugata wo
akipagwi no pananwo no susuki po ni pa idezu wa ga kwopwiwataru komoriduma pa mo
wa ga yadwo ni sakisi akipagwi tirisugwite mwi ni naru madeni kimi ni apanu kamo
wa ga yadwo no pagwi sakinikyeri tiranu ma ni paya kite mi besi nara no satwobito
isipasino mama ni opwitaru kapobana no pana ni si arikyeri aritutu mireba
pudipara no purinisi satwo no akipagwi pa sakite tiriniki kimi matikanete
akipagwi wo tirisugwinu bemi tawori moti miredomo sabusi kimi ni si araneba
asita saki yupubye pa kenuru tukwikusa no kenu beki kwopwi mo ware pa suru kamo

sentence.transcription: ke nu be ki kwopwi mo

block.header: akidunwo no wobana kariswope akipagwi no pana wo pukasane kimi ga karipo ni
sakyeri to mo sirazu si araba moda mo aramu ko no akipagwi wo misetutu motona
aki sareba kari tobikwoyuru tatutayama tatite mo wite mo kimi wo si so omopu
wa ga yadwo no kuzupa pinikyeni irodukinu kimasanu kimi pa nanigokoro so mo
asipikwino yama sanakadura momitu made imo ni apazu ya wa ga kwopwi woramu
momitiba no sugwikatenu kwo wo pitoduma to mitutu ya aramu kwoposiki monowo
kimi ni kwopwi sinayeurabure wa ga woreba akikaze pukite tukwi katabukinu
aki no ywo no tukwi kamo kimi pa kumogakuri simasiku mineba kokoda kwoposiki
nagatukwi no ariake no tukuywo aritutu mo kimi ga kimasaba ware kwopwime ya mo
yosiweyasi kwopwizi to suredo akikaze no samuku puku ywo pa kimi wo si so omopu
kedasiku mo ana kokorona to omopu ramu aki no nagaywo wo inepusaku nomwi
aki no ywo wo nagasi to ipedo tumorinisi kwopwi wo tukuseba mizikaku arikyeri
aki tu pa ni nipopyeru koromo ware pa kizi kimi ni maturaba yworu mo kiru gane
tabi ni sura obi toku monowo koto sigemi marone ware pa su nagaki ko no ywo wo

sentence.transcription: naga ki ko no ywo wo

block.header: sigure puru akatokitukuywo pimo tokazu kwopu ramu kimi to woramasi monowo
momitiba ni oku siratuyu no iro ni pa mo idezi to omopeba koto no sigekyeku
ame pureba tagitu yamagapa ipa ni pure kimi ga kudakamu kokoro pa motazi
papurira ga ipapu yasiro no momitiba mo simenapa kwoyete tiru to ipu monowo
koporogi no wa ga toko no pye ni nakitutu motona okwiwitutu kimi ni kwopuru ni inekatenaku ni

sentence.transcription: wa ga toko no pye ni

block.header: padasusuki po ni pa sakidenu kwopwi wo wa ga suru tamakagiru tada pitome nomwi misi pito yuweni

sentence.transcription: po ni pa saki de nu

block.header: wa ga swode ni arare tabasiru makikakusi ketazute aramu imo ga mimu tame
asipikino yama ka mo takaki makimuku no kwisi no kwomatu ni miyuki purikuru
makimuku no pipara mo imada kumowineba kwomatu ga ure yu awayuki nagaru
asipikino yamadi mo sirazu sirakasi no yeda mo towowoni yuki no purereba
asipikino yamadi mo sirazu sirakasi no yeda mo tawatawa yuki no purereba
narayama no mine napo kwirapu ube si koso magaki ga moto no yuki pa kezukyere
koto puraba swode sape nurete toporu beku purinamu yuki no swora ni kenitutu
ywo wo samumi asatwo wo piraki ide mireba nipa mo padarani miyuki puritari
ywo wo samumi asatwo wo piraki ide mireba nipa mo podoroni yuki so puritaru
yupu sareba koromode samusi takamatu no yama no kwi gotoni yuki so puritaru
wa ga swode ni purituru yuki mo nagareyukite imo ga tamoto ni iyukipurenu ka
awayuki pa kyepu pa na puri so sirwotapeno swode makiposamu pito mo aranaku ni

sentence.transcription: pito mo ara na ku ni

block.header: panapada mo puranu yuki yuwe kotitaku mo ama tu miswora pa kumorapitutu
wa ga sekwo wo ima ka ima ka to ide mireba awayuki pureri nipa mo podoroni
asipikino yama ni sirwoki pa wa ga yadwo ni kinopu no yupupye purisi yuki kamo
ta ga sono no ume no pana so mo pisakatano kiywoki tukuywo ni kokoda tirikuru
ume no pana madu saku yeda wo taworiteba tutwo to nadukete yosopetemu kamo
ta ga sono no ume ni ka arikyemu kokodaku mo sakinikyeru kamo migaposi madeni

sentence.transcription: ume ni ka ari kye mu

block.header: kite mi beki pito mo aranaku ni wagipye n aru ume no patupana tirinu tomo yosi
yuki samumi saki ni pa sakanu ume no pana yosi ko no koro pa kakute mo aru gane
imo ga tame potuye no ume wo taworu to pa siduye no tuyu ni nurenikyeru kamo
yatanonwo no asadi iroduku aratiyama mine no awayuki samuku tiru rasi
saywo pukeba idekomu tukwi wo takayama no mine no sirakumo kakusu ramu kamo
puru yuki no swora ni kenu beku kwopuredomo apu yosi nasi ni tukwi so penikyeru

sentence.transcription: swora ni ke nu be ku

block.header: awayuki pa tipye ni purisikye kwopwisikyeku kenagaki ware pa mitutu sinwopamu
sakideteru ume no siduye ni oku tuyu no kenu beku imo ni kwopuru ko no koro

sentence.transcription: ke nu be ku imo ni

block.header: panapada mo ywo pukete na yuki miti no bye no yusasa no upe ni simo no puru ywo wo
sasa no pa ni padare puriopopi kenaba ka mo wasuremu to ipeba masite omopoyu
arare puri itaku kaze puki samuki ywo ya patanwo ni koyopi wa ga pitori nemu

sentence.transcription: wa ga pito ri ne mu

block.header: yonabari no nwogwi ni puriopopu sirayuki no itisirwoku si mo kwopwimu ware kamo
pitome misi pito ni kwopuraku amagwirasi purikuru yuki no kenu beku omopoyu
omopiiduru toki pa subye nami toyokuni no yupu yama yuki no kenu beku omopoyu
ime no goto kimi wo apimite amagwirasi purikuru yuki no kenu beku omopoyu
wa ga sekwo ga koto utukusimi idete yukaba mobiki sirukyemu yuki na puri sone
ume no pana sore to mo miyezu puruyukino itisirwokyemu na matukapi yaraba

sentence.transcription: sore to mo mi ye zu

block.header: ume no pana sore to mo miyezu puru yuki ni matukapi yaraba sore to siramu na

sentence.transcription: sore to mo mi ye zu

block.header: amagwirapi purikuru yuki no kiyenu tomo kimi ni apamu to nagarapewataru
ukanerapu tomiyama yuki no itisirwoku kwopwiba imo ga na pito siramu kamo
amawobune patusenoyama ni puruyukino kenagaku kwopwisi kimi ga oto so suru

sentence.transcription: kimi ga oto so su ru

block.header: wazami no mine yukisugwite puru yuki no itopi mo nasi to mawose so no kwo ni
wa ga yadwo ni sakitaru ume wo tukuywo yomi yopiyopi misemu kimi wo koso mate
asipikwino yama no arasi pa pukanedomo kimi naki yopi pa kanete samusi mo
